scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/ui build && bun run --cwd packages/server build && bun run --cwd packages/tui build && bun run --cwd packages/tickets build
scripts.build:bin: bun run build:web && bun build packages/server/src/binary.ts --compile --conditions=bun --outfile dist-bin/tickets && bun build packages/tui/src/index.tsx --compile --conditions=bun --outfile dist-bin/tickets-tui
scripts.build:web: bun build apps/web/src/main.ts --outdir apps/web/dist --conditions=bun --minify && bun build packages/ui/src/index.ts --outfile apps/web/dist/components.js --conditions=bun --minify && cp apps/web/index.html apps/web/dist/index.html
